frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup appears correct with drain properly positioned

Needle being passed through the first mark on the Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good needle angle and control during first pass

frame_analyses.description: Suture being pulled through drain with visible marks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean passage through tissue, suture appears properly positioned

frame_analyses.description: Working on second pass through the drain at the second mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good instrument control for second placement

frame_analyses.description: Beginning knot tying with formation of first throw loop
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Starting surgeon's knot formation with appropriate loop size

frame_analyses.description: Completing first throw of surgeon's knot with double pass
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Double throw technique executed properly for surgeon's knot

frame_analyses.description: Forming second throw with hand switching from first throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good hand switching technique, maintaining proper tension

frame_analyses.description: Creating final throw with opposite hand direction
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switching maintained for third throw

frame_analyses.description: Using scissors to cut first suture end
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting technique with appropriate tail length

frame_analyses.description: Cutting second suture end to complete the task
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Both ends cut cleanly within the trainer

frame_analyses.description: Task completed with knot secured and suture ends cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final result shows well-formed knot with drain slit closed

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed well
Single throw with proper hand switching from first throw
Final single throw with appropriate hand switching

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with no visible gaps

technique_summary: Excellent performance with proper surgeon's knot, correct hand switching sequence, and accurate suture placement. All technical requirements met with good efficiency.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly faster instrument exchanges to improve time
Minor refinement in suture placement precision could eliminate small penalties
